candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: If a small, pinhole-size leak were to be drilled into each container, the container with which gas would experience the fastest pressure decrease? 10.0g each of three different gases are present in three glass containers of identical volume, as shown below. The temperature of all three flasks is held constant at $298$ K.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
已知有三个容器分别装有$10.0\,\mathrm{g}$的$\mathrm{SO_2}$、$\mathrm{CH_4}$和$\mathrm{NCl_3}$气体,三个容器的温度均保持在$298\,\mathrm{K}$。如果在每个容器上钻一个针孔大小的小孔,则哪个容器的气体压力下降最快?

A. $\mathrm{SO_2}$
B. $\mathrm{CH_4}$ 
C. $\mathrm{NCl_3}$
D. 三个容器的气体压力下降速率相同。
metadata.explanation_zh: 气体扩散速率与其摩尔质量的平方根成反比。摩尔质量较小的气体(在这种情况下为 $\ce{CH4}$)的分子具有更高的平均运动速度,因此更容易与扩散孔发生碰撞并从中逸出。
